# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

No implementation/code changes are present in this commit; the diff only appends entries to `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm-5/journal.ndjson` and adds `stage_resolution_snapshot` metadata in `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm-5/run.json`. Since no runtime paths were modified, no correctness, safety, robustness, or maintainability bugs were introduced by this change set.

## Amendments

None.
